profile.name: xEcho
profile.bio:
First facilitator to support on-chain settlement callbacks.

xEcho makes every AI tool, API, and model an autonomous economic entity.

Based on x402&ERC-8004

tweets.text:
The Facilitator with a post-payment hook is live! 🔥

The x402 protocol now supports diverse payment experiences—just like traditional payment systems—including: Cashback, Split Payouts, and Pay-to-earn.

Everything is completed onchain, and it takes just two line of code to…

xEcho Facilitator in the house! @x402Foundation

We explored on-chain settlement callbacks and enabled on-chain post-payment programmability in x402 v1 🆒

We're continuing to build on v2 😊 The future of x402 is HUGE!

2026 is the year of Agentic Commerce.

Every AI agent will need:
> Identity
> Payment capability
> On-chain settlement

xEcho makes it possible — turning every payment into a programmable event.

The future is autonomous. 🔥
Payment hooks are absorbing x402, with more and more x402 projects being built around them

🚀 After millions of payments on x402, we're excited to introduce x402 V2.

Listening to community feedback, we're releasing V2 to evolve internet-native payments with greater flexibility and power.

What's new 🧵

The facilitator fee is a key step in the X402 protocol.

Xecho provides an alternative approach: collecting fees automatically through on-chain payment callbacks.

This keeps the facilitator API-key–free, open, and easy to use.

Coinbase x402 Facilitator will introduce a minimal fee starting Jan 1, 2026:

→ Free Tier: First 1,000 settled payments/month
→ Pricing: Just $0.001 per settled payment after that

The low fee will ensure our ability to continue offering and improving this service.

Details 🧵

> Onchain Post-payment Hook
> Enable Programmable Payment

All the secrets of on-chain settlement callbacks live inside the open-source xEcho repository 👇

https://github.com/xecho-x402-fun/contracts_v1

xEcho is building on top of x402, turning every payment into a programmable event —a Payment Hook that makes settlement itself extensible, composable, and intelligent.

In xEcho, every payment talks.

Through the extensible design, It can trigger staking, reward logic,…

> pay
> mint
> create pool
in one transaction

Integration with xEcho Facilitator

1️⃣ Use the xEcho Facilitator endpoint:https://facilitator.xechoai.xyz
2️⃣ Create a Settler as the receiving address:https://www.xechoai.xyz/settlerhub

After this setup, the Facilitator automatically triggers the Settler's on-chain settlement callback after a…
Building something even more interesting together with @x420yo on top of the payment hook! Excited for what's coming!

3/
✅xEchoは、x402が「ただのP2P送金で終わる」問題を解消して、

『支払いそのものをDeFi的にプログラム可能にするレイヤー』だ

ファシリテーター報酬なし問題に対しても、「報酬やインセンティブ配分を設計できる場」を提供している。

content.overview: xEcho is a platform enabling 'programmable payments' for AI interactions through onchain settlement mechanisms. Core proposition: creating economic incentives within AI agent ecosystems.
content.key_innovation: Onchain Post-payment Hook enabling result-based agent compensation
content.technology: Built on x402 and ERC-8004 standards for payment protocol integration

products.name: xEcho Facilitator
products.description: First facilitator to support on-chain settlement callbacks, enabling programmable x402 payments and pay-to-X economies

products.name: Settler Hub
products.description: Infrastructure for implementing pay-to-earn and other programmable features within x402 payment flows

products.name: xEcho Agent
products.description: Monetized agent resource discovery dashboard (Coming Soon)

content.business_model: Circular economy thesis: AI creates economy, economy amplifies AI. Revenue through transaction settlement and facilitator services.

content.description: Programmable settlement contracts for USDC (EIP-3009) on Base. Powers pay-to-X economies and result-based agent payment through on-chain settlement callbacks.

core_contracts.name: FacilitatorSettlementProxyUpgradeable
core_contracts.function: Routes USDC EIP-3009 transfers and executes settlement callbacks atomically when recipients implement ISettler interface

core_contracts.name: xEchoSettlerFactoryUpgradeable
core_contracts.function: Deploys settler instances as UUPS proxies and manages companion RewardToken creation

core_contracts.name: Pay2MintSettlerUpgradeable
core_contracts.function: Three-phase workflow: Mint → Uniswap V3 Launch → Earn

core_contracts.name: Pay2Mintv1SettlerUpgradeable
core_contracts.function: Simplified variant with USDC caps and fixed liquidity

core_contracts.name: CashbackSettlerUpgradeable
core_contracts.function: Distributes cashback for initial payments, forwards remainder

core_contracts.name: RewardToken
core_contracts.function: ERC20 token with transfer restrictions until settlers enable transactions during launch phase

results.x402_overview: x402 is an open standard for internet native payments. Transforms HTTP 402 'Payment Required' status codes into micropayment rails for APIs and M2M transactions. Token and chain-neutral infrastructure. Coinbase's reference implementation used USDC on Base.
results.erc8004_overview: ERC-8004 is an Ethereum-based protocol for AI agent trust, identity, discoverability, and reputation. Co-authored by Marco De Rossi (MetaMask), Davide Crapis (Ethereum Foundation), Jordan Ellis (Google), and Erik Reppel (Coinbase).
erc8004_registries: Identity Registry: ERC-721 NFT as identity credential for agents
Reputation Registry: Decentralized feedback based on x402 payment proofs
Validation Registry: Third-party verification via TEE oracles, staked inference, or zk-ML proofs
results.relationship: x402 fixes payments, ERC-8004 builds trust. ERC-8004 agent cards include HTTP endpoints and x402 payment configurations.
results.timeline: EIP draft created August 13, 2025. Formally unveiled by Ethereum Foundation's dAI team and Consensys on October 9, 2025.

web_searches.query: xEcho AI agent payment coinbase base

x402_ecosystem.foundation: Coinbase and Cloudflare jointly established x402 Foundation
x402_ecosystem.pricing: Coinbase charges no facilitator fee for USDC on Base

key_observations.stage: Pre-seed/Early seed - Account created Oct 27, 2025 (~3 months old). v0.1.0 product. 1 commit on GitHub.
key_observations.traction: Facilitator is live on Base mainnet. Part of x402 ecosystem which has 'millions of payments'. xEcho tweets about v2 indicate iteration.
key_observations.technology: Solid technical foundation - smart contracts use OpenZeppelin upgradeable patterns, UUPS proxies, integrates Uniswap V3. Innovative settlement callback architecture.
key_observations.market_timing: Excellent - riding x402 wave which has massive momentum (5.3k GitHub stars, 146 contributors, 409 dependent projects). Coinbase backing for x402 protocol.
key_observations.competitive_position: First mover on settlement callbacks / payment hooks within x402 ecosystem. Unique value prop vs vanilla x402.
key_observations.team_concerns: Anonymous team. Only 1 GitHub contributor visible. No public team disclosure.
key_observations.funding_status: No funding information found. Likely unfunded or very early angel.
key_observations.community: Small but engaged - 627 followers, decent engagement on tweets (19-1537 likes)
